name: Diagrams.net
description: Diagrams.net — Free web-based diagram editor (draw.io) supporting architecture, flowchart, and UML diagram creation.

seo.title: Diagrams.net — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Diagrams.net: Diagrams.net — Free web-based diagram editor (draw.io) supporting architecture, flowchart, and UML diagram creation.

when_to_use: Flowchart creation for business process documentation
UML class diagrams for software design review
Free draw.io alternative to paid diagramming tools
Embedded diagram editor in wiki or documentation site

pros: Free forever with no account required
Desktop, browser, and VS Code versions
cons: UI isn't as polished as Lucidchart
review.verdict: The unbeatable free diagramming tool for engineers—especially for architecture and flowcharts.
review.best_for: Engineers drawing architecture and sequence diagrams without vendor lock-in
review.not_for: Design teams wanting real-time multi-cursor collaboration like Figma
